text: A person may not operate a motorcycle described by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a)(C)(vii) on a public highway for which the posted speed limit is more than 45 miles per hour, except that the operator may cross an intersection with a public highway that has a posted speed limit of more than 45 miles per hour.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.4165 — Operation of Certain Motorcycles

A person may not operate a motorcycle described by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a)(C)(vii) on a public highway for which the posted speed limit is more than 45 miles per hour, except that the operator may cross an intersection with a public highway that has a posted speed limit of more than 45 miles per hour.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1217 (S.B.1756), Sec. 5, eff. June 19, 2015.*
